title: alcantarea vinicolor
intro: Alcantarea vinicolor, also known as the yellow pineapple or Brazilian pine, is a type of plant species belonging to the bromeliad family, characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers and edible fruit. The medicinal properties of Alcantarea vinicolor include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Alcantarea vinicolor include its ability to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and provide essential nutrients. Herbal preparations of Alcantarea vinicolor can be made by boiling the leaves and using the resulting infusion as a medicinal tea.
